payload.answer: The new fact appears to conflict with the existing current fact. Existing memory says Sam works at Goldman, while the new fact says Sam left Goldman and joined Point72. Safe actions available: approve_supersession to treat the new employment transition as replacing the current Goldman employment fact; keep_both if both should remain because there is ambiguity or they refer to different contexts; reject_new if the new statement is incorrect or should not be stored; edit if the wording needs correction before saving.
